title: Astra Components Demo
description: Three component systems (TSX SSR + MoonBit SSR + Web Component island) composed on one Astra page.
headSnippets: <meta property="og:description" content="Three component systems on one Astra page: TSX SSR, MoonBit SSR, Web Component island.">

<style>:root{color-scheme:light}body{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;max-width:880px;margin:0 auto;padding:32px 24px;color:#111827;background:#ffffff}h1{font-size:36px;margin:0 0 12px;letter-spacing:-0.02em}h2{font-size:22px;margin:0 0 12px}.lead{font-size:16px;opacity:0.75;margin:0 0 32px}.component-section{padding:20px;border:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.3);border-radius:12px;margin:16px 0}.component-section .label{display:inline-block;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:999px;background:#eef2ff;color:#4338ca;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:8px}.color-palette-swatches{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-top:12px}.color-palette-swatches .swatch{width:64px;height:64px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding-bottom:4px;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}.info-box{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;padding:12px;border-radius:8px;background:#f0fdf4;border:1px solid #86efac;margin-top:12px}.info-box .icon{font-size:24px;line-height:1}.info-box .body{flex:1}.info-box .body strong{display:block;margin-bottom:4px}my-counter{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:12px;padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.3);border-radius:8px}my-counter button{padding:4px 12px;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid currentColor;background:transparent;color:inherit;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px}my-counter .count{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;min-width:32px;text-align:center;font-weight:600}footer{margin-top:48px;padding-top:24px;border-top:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.2);font-size:14px;opacity:0.7;text-align:center}@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){*{animation-duration:0.001s!important;transition-duration:0.001s!important}}</style>
